task_name: add model rename API endpoint and CLI command

details.reasoning: All rubric requirements fully met: RenameRequest struct with proper json tags in api/types.go; Client.Rename method in api/client.go POSTing to /api/rename; Server.RenameHandler in server/routes.go properly validates inputs and calls RenameModel which copies the manifest file then deletes source, returning 404 (os.StatusNotFound) for missing source and 409 (os.StatusConflict) for existing destination; route registration r.POST("/api/rename", s.RenameHandler); CLI command "rename SOURCE DESTINATION" with cobra.ExactArgs(2) and proper RunE handler; CLI RenameHandler correctly calls client.Rename; no existing test files or code modified, only new code added. Implementation is complete, correct, and follows existing patterns.
